title: Bucket of Frog
description: Capture frogs in buckets and carry them safely with you
body:
![The player collects frogs using an empty bucket](https://i.ibb.co/jSg52H7/Bucket-Of-Frog-Demo.gif)

___

**Bucket of Frog** is a new item and a simple mod that lets you capture any of the three frog variants — cold, warm, or temperate — using an empty bucket.

Just approach a frog and right-click it with a bucket to pick it up and store it in your inventory. This way you can easily transport frogs and make it simpler to complete the advancement **_When the Squad Hops into Town_**.

___

![Three buckets with different frogs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K49NhW9E/images/851310618ed11d4624fbd100f810bcf4e79be2f6.png)

___

![Bucket of Frog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K49NhW9E/images/4eeddf47e4a757d4426caed6c746116bc5f0fe5a.png)
